title: Blueberry Pet Essentials 10 Patterns Pink Flamingo on Light Emerald Adjustable Dog Collar, Small, Neck 12"-16"

variation_files.prompt: A close-up portrait of a fluffy white dog with perked ears and dark, expressive eyes, looking slightly to the side. The dog is wearing the dog collar around its neck, positioned just below the base of the ears. The background is a plain, solid white, creating a clean and minimalistic studio-style look. The lighting is soft and even, highlighting the dog’s fur texture and facial features without harsh shadows. The collar is shown in place, fitting snugly, with the buckle and metal D-ring visible on the side. The overall composition focuses on the dog’s face and upper chest, emphasizing the collar as a natural part of the dog’s appearance.

title: Personalized Dog Blanket Custom Dog Blanket Name Personalized Puppy Pet Blanket Dog Gift for Dog Lovers Mom Dad Cute Dog Paws Bones Soft Cozy Fleece Throw Blanket for Bed Sofa Couch Travel XS for Pet

variation_files.prompt: A pink dog blanket with a pattern of paw prints and cursive names is draped over the back of a light gray sofa. The blanket is slightly wrinkled and hangs down the front, with its edges softly folded. The setting is a bright, minimalist living room with a light wooden floor and a plain white wall in the background. To the left of the sofa, a potted snake plant in a woven basket with a dark gray base sits on the floor. The lighting is soft and even, creating a clean and cozy atmosphere. The blanket is the central focus, positioned naturally as if casually placed on the furniture.

A large rectangular fabric tapestry is hung on a plain white wall above a modern gray sofa in a well-lit living room. The tapestry features a repeating pattern of paw prints and cursive names in various shades of pink and white, displayed on a light pink background. The fabric is slightly draped, creating natural folds and soft shadows across its surface. Below the tapestry, the living room includes a plush gray sofa with decorative throw pillows, a set of round wire-frame coffee tables with wooden tops, a small side table with a vase of dried branches, a white armchair with wooden legs, and a tall black floor lamp with a dark shade. A light-colored textured rug covers the floor. The overall lighting is bright and even, suggesting natural
